name: afapay-backend
description: AfaPay onboarding API for registration, verification, and login

scripts.check: node --check afapay.server.js && node --check routes/afapayAuth.routes.js && node --check routes/afapayDashboard.routes.js && node --check routes/afapayChat.routes.js && node --check routes/afapaySecurity.routes.js && node --check services/mediaStorage.service.js && node --check services/securityHash.service.js && node --check models/afapayChatRoom.model.js && node --check models/afapayChatSetting.model.js && node --check models/afapayMessage.model.js && node --check models/afapayUserReport.model.js && node --check models/afapayUserDevice.model.js && node --check models/afapayRefreshToken.model.js && node --check models/afapayPinCredential.model.js && node --check models/afapayBiometricSetting.model.js && node --check models/afapayLoginHistory.model.js && node --check models/afapayPinAttempt.model.js && node --check models/afapaySecurityAuditLog.model.js
